Definition: Article identifier (e.g., First author last name_publication year)
Taxa category for species studied in article
Total field seasons reported in article (where only year was presented, 1 field season = 1 year)
Abbreviation of the tracking + imaging devices used in article
Label of tracking and imaging devices used, grouping tracking into Acoustic, PIT, Radio, Data logger, or Satellite and imaging into Baited, Mobile, Stationary, or Animalborne

Broad categories of tracking and imaging devices used, grouping tracking into either requiring a receiver (PIT, Radio, Acoustic), No receiver (Data logger, satellite), or having deployed Both types of tracking devices, paired with imaging devices grouped into  into Baited, Mobile, Stationary, or Animalborne
Strictly the tracking group used, as labelled by intermediate device pairing
Strictly the imaging group that was used, as labelled by intermediate device pairing

Ecological discipline that the article was studying, as identified in the objectives of the abstract or introduction. (i.e., Behavioural Ecology, Conservation Measures, Fisheries Management, Methodological, Other Drivers of Movement and Behavior, Reproductive Ecology, Resource-Use Management)
The ecological sub-discipline that the article was studying, as part of the larger discipline
Identification of whether only 2 devices (single) were used, or >3 devices (multiple) were used
Number of devices used in pairing
Water body the article deployed device pairing (i.e., saltwater, freshwater, brackish)
Min depth imaging device was deployed
Maximum depth imaging device was deployed
Minimum length of individual tagged
Maximum length of individal tagged
Minimum days species were tracked using tracking device
Maximum days species were tracked using tracking device
Minimum hours imaging device was recording
Maximum hours imaging device was recording
Notes on articles extracted
Categories for the different depths where imaging devices were deployed, as identified through summary of Max_C_Depth_m
Categories for the different lengths of individuals tagged using tracking devices, as identified through summary of Min_length_Tag_cm
Categories for the different days where species were tracked using tracking devices, as identified through summary of Max_Days_Tracked
Categories for the different hours that imaging devices were recording, as identified through summary of Max_Hours_Recorded
